creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

    mail/claws-mail: Update to 3.19.0

    - Update to 3.19.0
    - Reset PORTREVISION where apropriate (notably in slave ports)

    And while here, also portclippy and portfmt a bit.
